title: Chat Groups
description: Shared rooms sit beside cocoons as their own runtime target. Create the room here, then step into the live workspace.
workspaceLoadFailed: Failed to load chat group workspace
listDescription: Rooms keep a shared timeline, a single AI runtime, and member-managed access.
emptyRooms: No chat groups yet. Create the first shared room to start a multi-user conversation.
previewDescription: Inspect the room contract before opening the live workspace.
workspaceHint: Group membership, message retraction, realtime streaming, and wakeup scheduling all live inside the workspace page.
emptySelection: Pick a room on the left to inspect its runtime settings and jump into the chat workspace.
deleteConfirm: Delete chat group "{{name}}"? This will clear its messages, wakeups, and audit trail.
dialogDescription: Keep the room intentional: one character, one active model, shared membership, and a clearly bounded runtime.
autoCompactionLabel: Enable automatic compaction in this room
writeMessagePlaceholder: Write a message to the room...
composerSharedHint: Shared room messages fan into one AI runtime.
roomStateDescription: Runtime signals exposed by the backend for this chat-group target.
membersDescription: Owner and admins manage membership, message moderation, and room configuration.
wakeupsDescription: Room-scoped scheduled prompts reuse the same runtime path as live chat.
emptyTimeline: No messages yet. Send the first note to start the room.
addMemberDescription: Use a visible user when available, or paste a raw user ID if your account cannot browse the global user directory.
scheduleWakeupDescription: Queue a room wakeup that will run through the same chat-group runtime and audit path.
